source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select CASE WHEN Location like 'MAD%' THEN 'MAC'
WHEN Location like 'FHIA%' THEN 'FHI'
WHEN Location like 'MAX%' THEN 'FHI'
WHEN Location like 'RITE%' OR Location like 'HOME SMART%' THEN 'RTW'
WHEN Location like 'STATEWIDE%' THEN 'SWR'
WHEN Location like 'CLOSET%' OR Location like 'RENUITY%' THEN 'CTA'
WHEN Location like 'PACIFIC%' OR Location like 'WEST%' THEN 'PBC'
WHEN Location like 'Unknown%' THEN 'NA'
WHEN Location like 'BYLTE%' THEN 'Bylte' END AS UnifiedLocation,CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), CAST(LossTime AS TIME), 108) AS LossTime_N,*,NULL as UNI_Occupation,NULL as UNI_InjuryCauseDesc
from ODS.CLAIMS_REPORTING

scripts.text:
UPDATE EDW.FACT_CLAIMS_REPORTING
SET 
  UNI_Occupation = CASE 
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'ADMINISTRATIVE%' THEN 'Administrative'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'ASSEMBLER%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'BATH%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CANVAS%' THEN 'Canvas'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CARPENTER%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CLERK%' THEN 'Clerk'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CONTRACTOR%' THEN 'Contractor'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'COURIER%' THEN 'Courier'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CUSTOMER%' THEN 'Customer Service Agent'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'DECORATOR%' THEN 'Decorator'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'DESIGN%' THEN 'Sales'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'ESTIMATOR%' THEN 'Estimator'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'FIELD%' THEN 'Supervisor/Manager'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'FLOATING%' THEN 'Warehouse'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'GLAZIER%' THEN 'Glazier'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'GROUP%' THEN 'Supervisor/Manager'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'HOUSEHOLD%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'INSPECTOR%' THEN 'Inspector'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'INSTALLER%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'JOURNEYMAN%' THEN 'Plumber'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'KITCHEN%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'LABOR%' THEN 'Laborer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'LEAD%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'MAINTENANCE%' THEN 'Maintenance'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'MANAGER%' THEN 'Supervisor/Manager'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'MARKET%' THEN 'Market Researcher'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'MEASURE%' THEN 'Measure Tech'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'OFFICE%' THEN 'Clerk'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'PLUMBER%' THEN 'Plumber'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'PRODUCTION%' THEN 'Supervisor/Manager'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'PROMOTER%' THEN 'F2F'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'REGIONAL%' THEN 'F2F Manager'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'RETAIL%' THEN 'F2F'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'SALES%' THEN 'Sales'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'SCHEDULER%' THEN 'Scheduler'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'SERVICE%' THEN 'Service'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TA%' THEN 'TA'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TECHNICAL%' THEN 'Technical'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TELEPHONE%' THEN 'Operator'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TILE%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TRAINING%' THEN 'Trainer'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TRUCK%' THEN 'Driver'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'WAREHOUSE%' THEN 'Warehouse'
    WHEN Source = 'United' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'WINDOW%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'ADMINISTRATIVE%' THEN 'Administrative'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'ASSEMBLE%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CANVAS%' THEN 'Canvas'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CARPENTER%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CLERK%' THEN 'Clerk'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CONTRACTOR%' THEN 'Contractor'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'COURIER%' THEN 'Courier'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'CUSTOMER%' THEN 'Customer Service'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'DECORATOR%' THEN 'Sales'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'ESTIMATOR%' THEN 'Estimator'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'GLAZIER%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'GROUP%' THEN 'Supervisor/Manager'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'HOUSEHOLD%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'INSPECTOR%' THEN 'Inspector'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'INTERVIEWER%' THEN 'Interviewer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'LABORER%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'MAINTENANCE%' THEN 'Maintenance'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'MANAGER%' THEN 'Supervisor/Manager'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'MARKET%' THEN 'Analyst'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'OFFICE%' THEN 'Clerk'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'PLUMBER%' THEN 'Plumber'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'SALES%' THEN 'Sales'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'SCHEDULER%' THEN 'Scheduler'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'SERVICE%' THEN 'Service'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TECHNICAL%' THEN 'Technical Illustrator'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TELEPHONE%' THEN 'Operator'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TILE%' THEN 'Installer'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'TRUCK%' THEN 'Driver'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'WAREHOUSE%' THEN 'Warehouse'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(Occupation) LIKE 'WINDOW%' THEN 'Installer'
  END,
  
  UNI_InjuryCauseDesc = CASE 
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'ANIMAL%' THEN 'Animal/Insect'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'BRN%' THEN 'Brn/Scld'
    WHEN Source='United' AND (UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'CAUGHT%' OR UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'CGHT%') THEN 'Caught In/Under/Between'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'CUT%' THEN 'Cut/Puncture/Scrape'
    WHEN Source='United' AND (UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'FALL%' OR UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'SLIP%') THEN 'Fall/Slip/Trip'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'FOREIGN%' THEN 'Foreign Body in Eye'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'MANUAL%' THEN 'Manual Material Handling'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'MISC%' THEN 'Misc:Other/Miscellaneous'
    WHEN Source='United' AND (UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'MOTOR%' OR UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'MTR%') THEN 'Motor Vehicle Incident'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'STRAIN%' THEN 'Strain'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'SPRAIN%' THEN 'Sprain'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'STRK%' THEN 'Struck/Step On'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) = 'STRUCK BY ANIMAL OR INSECT' THEN 'Struck By Animal Or Insect'
    WHEN Source='United' AND (UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'STRUCK%' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) != 'STRUCK BY ANIMAL OR INSECT') THEN 'Struck By'
    WHEN Source='United' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'TEMPERATURE%' THEN 'Temperature Extremes'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'BRN%' THEN 'Burn/Scold'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'CGHT%' THEN 'Cght In/Btwn/Under'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'CUT%' THEN 'Cut/Puncture/Scrape'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'FALL%' THEN 'Fall/Slip/Trip'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'MISC%' THEN 'Miscellaneous/Other'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'MTR%' THEN 'Motor Vehicle'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'STRAIN%' THEN 'Strain'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'STRK%' THEN 'Struck/Strep'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) = 'STRUCK BY ANIMAL OR INSECT' THEN 'Struck By Animal Or Insect'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND (UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'STRUCK%' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) != 'STRUCK BY ANIMAL OR INSECT') THEN 'Struck By'
    WHEN Source = 'ICW' AND UPPER(InjuryCauseDesc) LIKE 'SPRAIN%' THEN 'Sprain'
  END
WHERE UNI_Occupation IS NULL OR UNI_InjuryCauseDesc IS NULL;

UPDATE  [EDW].[FACT_CLAIMS_REPORTING] 
SET LP_EmployeeID_REF=NULL;

UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_EmployeeID_REF = B.EmployeeId
FROM
[EDW].[FACT_CLAIMS_REPORTING] A 
JOIN
(	
		SELECT * 
			FROM 
				(
					SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
					Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					WHERE Active=1
					AND LEFT(FirstName, 1) != '_'
					) EX
			WHERE RW=1
		
		) B

ON  LTRIM(RTRIM(LEFT(A.Name, CHARINDEX(',', A.Name) - 1))) 				= B.LastName
AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RIGHT(A.Name, LEN(A.Name) - CHARINDEX(',', A.Name)))) 	= B.FirstName
WHERE A.LP_EmployeeID_REF IS NULL;



UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_EmployeeID_REF = B.EmployeeId
FROM
[EDW].[FACT_CLAIMS_REPORTING] A 
JOIN
(	
		SELECT * 
			FROM 
				(
					SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
					Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					WHERE Active=1
					AND LEFT(FirstName, 1) != '_'
					) EX
			WHERE RW=1
		
		) B

ON  LTRIM(RTRIM(LEFT(A.Name, CHARINDEX(',', A.Name) - 1))) 				= B.LastName
AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RIGHT(A.Name, LEN(A.Name) - CHARINDEX(',', A.Name)))) 	LIKE '%' + B.FirstName + '%'
WHERE A.LP_EmployeeID_REF IS NULL;







UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_EmployeeID_REF = B.EmployeeId
FROM
[EDW].[FACT_CLAIMS_REPORTING] A 
JOIN
(	
		SELECT * 
			FROM 
				(
					SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
					Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					WHERE Active=1
					AND LEFT(FirstName, 1) != '_'
					) EX
			WHERE RW=1
		
		) B

ON  LTRIM(RTRIM(LEFT(A.Name, CHARINDEX(',', A.Name) - 1))) 				LIKE '%' + B.LastName + '%'
AND LTRIM(RTRIM(RIGHT(A.Name, LEN(A.Name) - CHARINDEX(',', A.Name))))   = B.FirstName 
WHERE A.LP_EmployeeID_REF IS NULL;




-- Mask BirthDate
UPDATE  [EDW].[FACT_CLAIMS_REPORTING]
SET BirthDate=NULL;
